iteration_1_baseline.notes: Baseline with original Chinese SKILL.md. Model replaced dots with hyphens in kebab-case rename (v3.1 -> v3-1)

iteration_2.notes: Rewrote skill in English, added explicit dot-preservation rule and example Python script. Passed but not consistently.

iteration_3.notes: Model still wrote its own regex [^a-z0-9] instead of using the provided one. Need stronger guidance.

iteration_4_final.notes: Moved batch rename section to top of skill, added CRITICAL RULES with explicit DO NOT use [^a-z0-9] warning, provided exact function to copy. Confirmed 100/100 on two consecutive runs.

changes: Rewrote skill from Chinese to English for better model comprehension
Moved batch rename section to top (most important for task performance)
Added explicit CRITICAL RULES block warning against [^a-z0-9] regex pattern
Provided exact copy-paste Python function with correct regex [\s_\(\)\[\]]+
Simplified directory analysis section with macOS-compatible commands
Removed verbose best practices and safety sections to reduce token count
